title: [Handshake] Added temporary support for memory data with handshake-runner
body:
1. Implemented a temporary pass to remove the `memref` in the handshake function after lowering from STD
2. The handshake-runner tries to find an initialization file for each memory op when allocating memory. The name of the file is `datain${MEMORY_OP_ID}.dat`. If no file is found, then the simulator initializes the memory with the provided data in the file. Otherwise, the memory is initialized as {0}.
3. Once the simulation finishes, an output file named `dataout${MEMORY_OP_ID}.dat` is generated for each memory op as the memory data after the computation.
